label: Analyst Judgment
definition: Qualitative assessment based on analyst expertise and market observation

label: Actual Outcome
definition: Retrospective record of what actually happened to a company, product, or technology after the study date; used to assess prescience

label: Archival inventory
definition: Counts or classifications computed from prior archive inventory tables.

label: Attribution audit
definition: Explicit accounting for author/source attribution buckets.

label: Benchmarking
definition: Systematic measurement and comparison of performance using standardized test specifications with full-disclosure reporting

label: Competitive Profiling
definition: Structured analysis of specific vendor strategies, product positioning, and competitive strengths and weaknesses

label: Coverage analysis
definition: Observation documenting evidence coverage.

label: Document Review
definition: Assessment based on review of published documentation such as vendor support policies and threat databases

label: Evidence example
definition: Pointer to an exemplar source observation from the inventory.

label: External verification
definition: Outcome endpoint validated against public web sources.

label: Industry Analysis
definition: Qualitative and quantitative assessment of industry trends, competitive dynamics, and market conditions using publicly available information

label: Longitudinal analysis
definition: Multi-period interpretation across technology and corporate lifecycle phases.

label: Market Data
definition: Quantitative or qualitative data point about market size, pricing, cost structures, or commercial dynamics derived from research

label: Methodology note
definition: Observation documenting rules or method constraints.

label: Prediction outcome analysis
definition: Assessment of earlier strategic claims against later outcomes.

label: Strategy Classification
definition: Categorization of organizational approach within the Aberdeen Competitive Framework tiers (Laggard, Industry Norm, Best in Class)

label: Technology lifecycle
definition: Observation documenting lifecycle state of a technology.

label: Technology lifecycle analysis
definition: Classification of technology lifecycle state across eras.

label: Thread density
definition: Observation documenting frequency of evidence in a thematic thread.

label: Topic Insight
definition: An analytical claim or framework point within a technology topic deep-dive

label: Vendor-Provided
definition: Data provided by the vendor (Dell) including pricing, service specifications, and program details

label: Vendor Briefing
definition: Data derived from vendor-provided briefings and documentation

label: Vendor Claim
definition: Claim made by IBM or Lotus in product documentation or briefings
